title: Senior Software Engineer - Aptech - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Aptech - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aptech. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
